items.title: [负面] I started the game when it's released on Steam. At...
items.summary:
I started the game when it's released on Steam. At first, it's very exciting and this game is very generous with the pull currency. You're probably happy at the beginning; however, that's until you know why they r generous with the pull, esp if you already knew the gameplay mechanic. 

1. Charas HP scaled of with Player's rank or level
While most games let you play character with its own HP, this game didnt use ur charas' traditional HP but somehow combined it into a one bar HP that scaled with your player's rank. Most of the stages also required you to be XX player's rank. You can still win it but with difficulty bc no other way to raise your HP aside from leveling your player's rank and that's took ages. Even if you upgrade your chara to max rarity or leveling them to max level, it didnt really bring many benefits if Boss or enemies can oneshot your flimsy HP bar. Your  enemies, on the other hand, have lots of HP and mostly, able to revive twice or thrice (in main story, not all boss). Im at player's rank 64 and my HP is just 2k ish.  

2. Boring endgame content (consisted mostly PvP or event stages (if there's event) 
After finishing story, there's nothing to do (esp if no event or it's rerun event that you already done) aside from playing the PvP. The PvP in this game is also unique, yes, uniquely annoying. Why? bc it's not auto. You have to play the PvP manually and every battle lasts a long time. I tried it once and it took around 10-15min for one battle, depending on your enemies and the animations. The worse part? You can't use x00 or skip directly to result to clear it. You need to do it x1 every time. Manually. 

3. No skip or auto battle or replay cleared stages
The fact that this game doesnt have this Qol makes everything incredibly long. Only certain stages that you can skip. The weekly dungeon part or even main story, cant be replayed even if you already cleared it. 

4. Can't target enemies in the battle
There's a reason why most games have auto-lock or locking enemies mechanic in their games. So, Im not sure why this game doesnt use the locking mechanic. It's very troublesome in certain battles when you have multiples mobs in boss stage. 

5. Pulling characters only for collection purpose. 
There's meta in this game but not so much till the point that the meta chara can cheese boss in T1 or T2 ( unless you're overpowering the boss). The strategy used in this game also very simple and plain. All you need just stack shield (bc your HP is very flimsy here), buff your chara, then pew pew. rinse and repeat. 

4. Translation using AI
I dont really mind as long as there's human proofreader but I dont think this game uses one. The names sometimes changing and it happens on the chara's skill text. Imagined the confusion

5. Story full with holes
I think this game drew inspiration from both Path to Nowhere and Reverse 1999. Some part of the story are in similar line with Path to Nowhere lore and it used modern country setting like in Reverse 1999. Sadly, the dev doesnt seem to build up this game's story (or, it's lost in translation). It never really explains what's dissolution that brings doom to civilization really about (equ to mania in Path to Nowhere, or like the Storm  in Reverse 1999). Story already finished and still not sure whether Dev will continue it or just that's it and focus on releasing new character's banner. 

Overall, if you have  a lot of time at your end, feel free to try this game. But, it will highly likely you will get bored and burnout after a month or two esp if you already cleared everything. Perhaps it will be bearable if game implemented skip/replay/auto function for battle mechanic. Im uninstalling this game but maybe will install it back if it has improvement.

items.title:
[正面] A really good game that i play almost everyday.
Ca...
items.summary:
A really good game that i play almost everyday.
Card system is really interesting and fun.
It makes you think before playing and finishing your turn.
The game is a rogue-like in the first place so that's what it excels at.
The story and the music are both really good.. i know the translations are not perfect ,but it is readable.
The art style is unique and lovely.

items.title:
[正面] 스토리는 스킵해서 잘 모르지만, 게임성을 두고 본다면 나쁘지 않다고 생각함.
필자는 덱빌딩...
items.summary:
스토리는 스킵해서 잘 모르지만, 게임성을 두고 본다면 나쁘지 않다고 생각함.
필자는 덱빌딩인줄 알고 왔지만 수집형 게임이라서 살짝 아쉬웠는데, 재미는 보장함.

 단점을 뽑으라면 많겠지만, 그 중 문제가 제일큰것만 뽑자면
1차로는 번역의 문제가 많음. 몇몇 문자는 안되어 있으며, 문단 전체가 안되어 있을때가 많음.
2차로는 몇몇 주요 고유어들의 설명이 안되어 있음. 

필자는 위 사항은 신경 안쓰기 대문에, 그냥 넘기면서 하고 있음.

재화도 많이 뿌리다보니 나쁘지 않다고 생각함.

items.title: [正面] Francamente, en un inicio me echó para atrás el en...
items.summary:
Francamente, en un inicio me echó para atrás el entrar ya que el juego solo estaba en japones, luego le agregaron ingles y ya me forcé a probarlo y ahora está en varios idiomas, el problema es que la traducción está hecha por ia y eso puede llegar a confundir con los efectos de ciertas habilidades (Me he encontrado que llaman a la misma habilidad de 3 formas diferentes en el mismo personaje).

(EDITADO, HAY COSAS QUE HAN CORREGIDO)

Lo malo:

- Traducción por IA (Allí se especifica que está en beta, con lo cual en un futuro puede que cambie, ahora hay una carta que dice MARICÓN, espero no la cambien, hizo mi día feliz)
- No hay consistencia con como se traducen los nombres de cosas como habilidades y lugares. 
- Los diálogos actualmente los han arreglado y si se pueden leer los textos, aunque van un poco rápido

Lo bueno:
- La comunidad hizo la traducción en ingles y ahora, si le sabes al ingles, está traducido un 80% del juego, me ha parecido una situación tierna
- Tenia un problema con que las cinemáticas se saltaban solas, ya se ha corregido.
- El arte es bellisimo, personajes, mundo, efectos, incluso las caricaturas simples que se manejan en los combates están bien hechas.
- La historia es atraparte y muchas veces me vi estando horas solo en el modo historia.
- Las inspiraciones a Lovecraft son notorias y el juego muchas veces busca inquietar con lo que sucede.
- La música también está muy bien hecha, aunque algunas bandas sonoras a veces se repiten más de la cuenta, en general no molesta.
- La jugabilidad es simple de entender y difícil de dominar, por más que algunas cosas están mal traducidas, cuando entiendes a que se refieren esas malas traducciones, te haces a la idea bastante rápido y entiendes combos o estrategias que pueden ser hacer de la travesía mucho más sencilla
- El farmeo del gacha se ha facilitado y regalan bastantes cosas, entre eventos y regalitos casi porque si muchas veces, con lo cual, está mucho mejor hecho esa parte.

Conclusión:

Si te interesa la historia que tiene que contar, superas las barreras del ingles (Si solo le entiendes al ingles, la IA es difícil de entender a veces), te llama la atención tanto el arte como la jugabilidad como son la creación de mazos, este juego es para ti. Si la barrera de la traducción es mucho problema, espera un tiempo, está en beta y si el juego sigue creciendo en jugadores es posible que lo terminen arreglando (O la comunidad se vuelva a unir y ayude a traducir más)

items.title:
[正面] Absolutely amazing game.
I have played a ton of g...
items.summary:
Absolutely amazing game.
I have played a ton of gacha games over the years and this is one of the best i've ever had the pleasure of playing.
the pulling mechanics are actually really forgiving and you don't feel bad at all for losing your 50/50 (which in this game is actually a 30/90 or smth?) since every character is really strong by itself.
Will definitely keep on playing, 9/10 game for sure!
